## Checklist (spec 8)

- [ ] Tests added/updated (`pytest` + `cargo test`)
- [ ] If `core/` was touched: validation re-run (`parameter_recovery`,
      `against_hgf_toolbox`) and still passing
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated
- [ ] Docs / Wiki updated if a new profile or task was added
- [ ] New profile/task has a literature-grounded rationale and a pre-registered
      prediction encoded in `tests/test_predictions.py`
- [ ] `pre-commit` clean (fmt, clippy, ruff)
